description: Real-world school weekly newsletter digest with multiple future events buried in lengthy text

input_summary.subject: Feb 11, 2026 Digest: 1 new message from Walnut Creek School District today

events.title: Staff Development Day - No School
events.description: Staff development day, no school for students. Teachers learning about math curriculum updates and student writing.

events.title: President's Day Weekend - No School
events.description: President's Day weekend, no school Friday through Monday.

events.title: PTA Meeting
events.description: PTA meeting.

events.title: Hygiene Care Kits Assembly
events.location: Lamorinda Music, 81 Lafayette Cr, Lafayette, CA 94549
events.description: Free assembly event to build hygiene care kits for families in need, organized by Mindful Littles.

events.title: Lunar New Year Activities
events.description: Lunar New Year activities at lunch.

events.title: PTA Meeting
events.description: PTA meeting in the cafe.

events.title: Taste & Toast
events.description: WCEF fundraiser event.

events.title: Spring Break
events.description: Spring break, no school.

events.title: WCI Parent Informational Night
events.description: Parent-only informational night about Walnut Creek Intermediate for incoming 6th graders.

events.title: WCI Open House
events.description: Annual Open House - families invited to walk the campus, visit classrooms.

events.title: WCSD Closed - Staff Development Day
events.description: No school for students. Teachers and staff will spend time together to learn about updates to the math curriculum and focus on student writing.

events.title: WCSD Closed - President's Day Weekend
events.description: No school for President's Day Weekend.

events.title: Walnut Heights PTA Meeting
events.description: Monthly PTA meeting at 7 PM.

events.title: Hygiene Care Kits Assembly Event
events.location: Lamorinda Music, 81 Lafayette Cir, Lafayette, CA 94549
events.description: Free assembly event by Mindful Littles to bundle hygiene care kits together with families during a community service event.

events.title: Lunar New Year Activities
events.description: Lunar New Year activities during lunch.

events.title: Youth Truth Survey Deadline
events.description: Deadline to complete the anonymous Youth Truth Survey for school and district feedback. URL: ytsurvey.org/wcsdfamily26.

events.title: WCI Parent Informational Night
events.description: Parent-only informational night for incoming 6th-grade families to learn about life at Walnut Creek Intermediate and meet the PTA.

events.title: WCI Administration Visit to Walnut Heights
events.description: Administrative and counseling team from WCI visit Walnut Heights students to preview the middle school experience.

events.title: WCI Annual Open House
events.description: Families are invited to walk the campus, visit classrooms, and experience firsthand what learning looks like at Walnut Creek Intermediate.

events.title: Taste & Toast
events.description: Community event supporting WCEF at Walnut Creek Downtown and Broadway Plaza.

events.title: WCSD Closed - Spring Break
events.description: School closed for Spring Break.
